title: Senior Financial Analyst - Fyers - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Fyers - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
